summary.en: Drawing and painting software for the iPad.
summary.zh: 專為 iPad 打造的繪圖與繪畫軟體。

highlight.en: A touch-native illustration app that brought layered digital painting to the iPad in its early days.
highlight.zh: 一款觸控原生的插畫應用程式,在 iPad 早期就將分層數位繪畫帶上平板。

summary.en: A modern alternative to Microsoft Project for managing project schedules.
summary.zh: 管理專案排程的工具,是 Microsoft Project 的現代替代方案。

highlight.en: Built around the Gantt chart to cut the tedious hours teams spend rebuilding presentations from already-updated project data.
highlight.zh: 以甘特圖為核心,省去團隊用已更新的專案資料重複製作簡報所耗費的繁瑣工時。

summary.en: A reimagined email inbox.
summary.zh: 重新設計的電子郵件收件匣。

highlight.en: A UK startup that set out to rethink how people experience and manage their email inbox.
highlight.zh: 一家英國新創,致力於重新思考人們使用與管理電子郵件收件匣的方式。

summary.en: A social feed like Twitter, but you post other people's status updates.
summary.zh: 類似 Twitter 的社群動態,但你發布的是別人的狀態。

highlight.en: A consumer social app that inverted the usual model by letting users share and relay others' status updates rather than their own.
highlight.zh: 一款消費者社群應用程式,顛覆常見模式,讓使用者分享與轉發他人的狀態,而非自己的。

summary.en: A cloud-native operational database built for speed and scale.
summary.zh: 專為速度與規模打造的雲原生營運型資料庫。

highlight.en: A distributed, massively scalable database (formerly MemSQL) tuned for high-concurrency ingest and real-time queries on any cloud or on-prem.
highlight.zh: 一款分散式、可大規模擴展的資料庫(前身為 MemSQL),針對高並發資料寫入與即時查詢調校,可運行於任何雲端或地端。

summary.en: A payouts platform for businesses to send money and gift cards anywhere, fast and free.
summary.zh: 讓企業隨處快速且免費寄送金錢與禮品卡的支付發放平台。

highlight.en: Used by 25k+ companies for one-time payouts such as research compensation, marketing incentives, and employee recognition.
highlight.zh: 逾 2.5 萬家企業用於一次性款項發放,如研究報酬、行銷獎勵與員工表揚。

summary.en: Corporate catering and cafeteria programs that help companies feed their employees.
summary.zh: 協助企業餵飽員工的企業外燴與餐廳方案。

highlight.en: Offers Cloud, Hybrid, Managed, and Event Cafe products so companies can pay only for employees who come into the office.
highlight.zh: 提供 Cloud、Hybrid、Managed 與 Event Cafe 等產品,讓企業只需為實際進辦公室的員工付費。

summary.en: A CRM with built-in sales communication and automation tools for startups and SMBs.
summary.zh: 內建銷售溝通與自動化工具、專為新創與中小企業打造的 CRM。

highlight.en: A modern CRM that bundles calling, email, and automation directly into the workflow so smaller sales teams can close faster.
highlight.zh: 一款現代 CRM,將通話、電子郵件與自動化直接整合進工作流程,讓較小的銷售團隊更快成交。

summary.en: A referral marketing platform that turns existing customers into marketers for online stores.
summary.zh: 將現有顧客轉化為行銷者、協助網路商店成長的推薦行銷平台。

highlight.en: At checkout it offers personalized deals customers can gift to friends, giving both sides a rebate to drive new referral sales.
highlight.zh: 結帳時提供個人化優惠,讓顧客可贈送給朋友,雙方都能獲得折扣,藉此帶動新的推薦銷售。

summary.en: An online marketplace connecting students with tutors.
summary.zh: 媒合學生與家教的線上市集。

highlight.en: A marketplace built to help learners find expert one-to-one tutoring across a wide range of subjects on demand.
highlight.zh: 一個市集,協助學習者依需求找到各種科目的專家一對一家教。

summary.en: A mobile app to order ahead for pickup from local merchants.
summary.zh: 可向在地商家預先點餐並自取的行動應用程式。

highlight.en: A mobile ordering and payments service connecting millions of users with thousands of local merchants for pickup orders.
highlight.zh: 一項行動點餐與支付服務,串連數百萬使用者與數千家在地商家進行自取訂單。

summary.en: An ad-style music platform where bands and labels bid to stream their music to listeners.
summary.zh: 讓樂團與唱片公司競標、將音樂串流給聽眾的廣告式音樂平台。

highlight.en: Pitched as Google AdWords for music, letting artists pay for airtime to reach a qualified, targeted audience.
highlight.zh: 定位為音樂版的 Google AdWords,讓藝人付費購買播放時段,觸及精準的目標聽眾。

summary.en: A service that records family stories and prints them into keepsake books.
summary.zh: 記錄家庭故事並印製成紀念書的服務。

highlight.en: Emails a weekly question about a person's life, collects their replies over a year, then binds the stories into a keepsake book.
highlight.zh: 每週寄出一個關於個人生活的問題,歷時一年收集回覆,再將這些故事裝訂成紀念書。

summary.en: A fashion shopping discovery app and email list.
summary.zh: 時尚購物探索應用程式與電子報。

highlight.en: Built Kaleidoscope, an inspiration-driven ecommerce app on iPhone and Android, from a team of ecommerce serial entrepreneurs.
highlight.zh: 由電商連續創業者團隊打造 Kaleidoscope,一款以靈感為導向、橫跨 iPhone 與 Android 的電商應用程式。

summary.en: A collaborative, web-based marketplace and toolset for hardware engineering design.
summary.zh: 以網頁為基礎、可協作的硬體工程設計市集與工具。

highlight.en: Unlike isolated single-user design tools, it is collaborative and cloud-accessible so teams can reuse content instead of duplicating work.
highlight.zh: 不同於孤立的單人設計工具,它可協作且雲端存取,讓團隊重複利用既有內容,而非重複勞動。

summary.en: A predictive analytics and segmentation platform for e-commerce marketing.
summary.zh: 用於電商行銷的預測分析與客群分群平台。

highlight.en: Uses customer analytics to treat shoppers as individuals and integrates with ESPs, display, and Facebook and Google audiences.
highlight.zh: 運用顧客分析將購物者視為獨立個體,並與 ESP、展示廣告及 Facebook、Google 受眾整合。

summary.en: A self-publishing platform for creating and selling ebooks.
summary.zh: 用於製作與銷售電子書的自助出版平台。

highlight.en: A San Francisco platform aiming to let every person publish a book and unlock untapped knowledge for sale.
highlight.zh: 一個位於舊金山的平台,目標是讓每個人都能出版書籍,並將尚未開發的知識變現銷售。

summary.en: A fellowship program turning PhDs and engineers into data scientists and data engineers.
summary.zh: 將博士與工程師培訓成資料科學家與資料工程師的獎助學程。

highlight.en: An intensive seven-week post-doctoral training program with 1,000 alumni at companies including Facebook, Netflix, and Apple.
highlight.zh: 一項為期七週的密集博士後培訓計畫,擁有 1,000 名校友,任職於 Facebook、Netflix、Apple 等公司。

summary.en: A payments infrastructure built for online marketplaces.
summary.zh: 專為線上市集打造的支付基礎設施。

highlight.en: Treated payments as core infrastructure, aiming to grow the global economy by enabling new forms of marketplace commerce.
highlight.zh: 將支付視為核心基礎設施,目標是透過促成新型態的市集商務來推動全球經濟成長。

summary.en: A mobile games studio.
summary.zh: 行動遊戲開發工作室。

highlight.en: A top-25 grossing mobile gaming studio backed by Andreessen Horowitz and Y Combinator.
highlight.zh: 一家營收名列前 25 名的行動遊戲工作室,由 Andreessen Horowitz 與 Y Combinator 投資。

summary.en: An all-in-one apartment marketing platform for brokerages and landlords.
summary.zh: 專為房仲與房東打造的一站式公寓行銷平台。

highlight.en: Founded in 2009, its automation has helped push over 3 million properties in front of prospective renters.
highlight.zh: 成立於 2009 年,其自動化技術已協助將超過 300 萬筆物件推送至潛在租客面前。

summary.en: A SaaS tool that improves user retention through triggered email campaigns.
summary.zh: 透過觸發式電子郵件提升使用者留存的 SaaS 工具。

highlight.en: Sends welcome, inactivity, and custom trigger-based drip emails to help companies keep users engaged over time.
highlight.zh: 寄送歡迎、未活躍及自訂觸發的滴灌式郵件,協助企業長期維持使用者的活躍度。

summary.en: Software for building and running online stores on Facebook.
summary.zh: 用於在 Facebook 上建立與經營網路商店的軟體。

highlight.en: Imports an existing web store into Facebook with promotion tools and analytics; over a thousand stores reach 50M+ fans.
highlight.zh: 將既有網路商店匯入 Facebook,並提供推廣工具與分析;逾千家商店觸及超過 5,000 萬名粉絲。

summary.en: A simple, affordable phone system for businesses, like Google Voice.
summary.zh: 簡單又平價的企業電話系統,類似 Google Voice。

highlight.en: Offers extensions, forwarding, and voicemail in an online business phone system starting at $10 a month.
highlight.zh: 以每月 10 美元起的線上企業電話系統,提供分機、轉接與語音信箱等功能。

summary.en: Pivoted to TenXList, a professional network of top college engineers.
summary.zh: 轉型為 TenXList,一個頂尖大學工程師的專業人脈網絡。

highlight.en: After its initial idea, the team pivoted to build TenXList, a curated professional network focused on top college engineers.
highlight.zh: 在最初的構想之後,團隊轉型打造 TenXList,一個聚焦頂尖大學工程師的精選專業人脈網絡。

summary.en: A gamified fitness app using your phone's motion sensors.
summary.zh: 運用手機動作感測器的遊戲化健身應用程式。

highlight.en: One of the first gamified fitness apps, it tracked motion via the iPhone accelerometer and added social cheering and levels.
highlight.zh: 最早的遊戲化健身應用程式之一,透過 iPhone 加速度計追蹤動作,並加入社群加油與升級機制。

summary.en: High-speed peer-to-peer file transfer technology for consumers.
summary.zh: 面向消費者的高速點對點檔案傳輸技術。

highlight.en: An on-demand peer-to-peer system that makes transferring any size file between two people as simple as clicking a link.
highlight.zh: 一套隨需的點對點系統,讓兩人之間傳輸任何大小的檔案,簡單到只需點一個連結。

summary.en: A marketplace turning your photos into hand-painted custom artwork.
summary.zh: 將你的照片轉化為手繪客製藝術品的市集。

highlight.en: Turns any photo into a hand-painted oil painting on real canvas, starting at $45 and delivered in under two weeks.
highlight.zh: 將任何照片轉成繪於真實畫布上的手繪油畫,45 美元起,並於兩週內送達。

summary.en: A real-time analytics product, acquired by Twitter in 2012.
summary.zh: 一項即時分析產品,於 2012 年被 Twitter 收購。

highlight.en: Started as Moki.TV, a directory of paid and free streaming content across Amazon, Netflix, Hulu, and iTunes.
highlight.zh: 前身為 Moki.TV,一個彙整 Amazon、Netflix、Hulu 與 iTunes 付費與免費串流內容的目錄。

summary.en: A real-time group messaging platform, like hosted IRC.
summary.zh: 即時群組訊息平台,類似託管版的 IRC。

highlight.en: Let users create public or private groups to post topics and chat in real time, founded in 2011 by ex-startup engineers.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者建立公開或私密群組,即時發布主題並交談,由前新創工程師於 2011 年創立。

summary.en: Enterprise-grade real-time messaging middleware for web applications.
summary.zh: 用於網路應用程式的企業級即時訊息中介軟體。

highlight.en: Licensed its Bridge middleware to enterprises and built the open-source NowJS framework for real-time Node.js apps.
highlight.zh: 將其 Bridge 中介軟體授權給企業,並打造開源框架 NowJS 供即時 Node.js 應用程式使用。

summary.en: A social directory of conferences and events, like an IMDB for conferences.
summary.zh: 研討會與活動的社群目錄,有如研討會版的 IMDB。

highlight.en: Helps users find conferences their Twitter friends attend, build a speaker portfolio, and follow events in real time.
highlight.zh: 協助使用者找到 Twitter 好友參加的研討會、建立講者作品集,並即時追蹤活動。

summary.en: A simple, social way to set up a trust fund to save for a child's future.
summary.zh: 以簡單又具社群性的方式設立信託基金,為孩子的未來儲蓄。

highlight.en: Lets parents create a child's trust in minutes for free, invite family to contribute, and invest it with Vanguard until age 18.
highlight.zh: 讓父母在幾分鐘內免費為孩子設立信託、邀請親友共同出資,並交由 Vanguard 投資至孩子滿 18 歲。

summary.en: A collaboration and project management tool integrated with Google Apps.
summary.zh: 與 Google Apps 整合的協作與專案管理工具。

highlight.en: Integrates with Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Box, and Dropbox so teams can manage tasks, events, and files from the inbox.
highlight.zh: 與 Gmail、雲端硬碟、日曆、Box 與 Dropbox 整合,讓團隊可直接從收件匣管理任務、活動與檔案。

summary.en: A marketplace for discovering and booking event venues.
summary.zh: 探索與預訂活動場地的市集。

highlight.en: Aims to streamline the most painful part of event planning, helping people find venues by budget, location, and size.
highlight.zh: 致力於簡化活動規劃中最棘手的環節,協助人們依預算、地點與規模尋找場地。

summary.en: An app that makes it easy to sell your stuff by just taking a photo.
summary.zh: 只需拍張照就能輕鬆出售物品的應用程式。

highlight.en: You snap a picture of an item and the app lists it for sale automatically; an iPhone prototype launched in February 2011.
highlight.zh: 你只要拍下物品照片,應用程式就會自動為其刊登銷售;iPhone 原型於 2011 年 2 月推出。

summary.en: A .NET cloud platform as a service for deploying applications.
summary.zh: 用於部署應用程式的 .NET 雲端平台即服務。

highlight.en: Developers push code via Git or Mercurial, and it builds, tests, and deploys most ASP.NET apps without modification.
highlight.zh: 開發者透過 Git 或 Mercurial 推送程式碼,它便建置、測試並部署多數 ASP.NET 應用程式,無需修改。

summary.en: Maker of next-generation tools for designing web content.
summary.zh: 打造新世代網頁設計工具的公司。

highlight.en: Builds designer-focused apps for producing beautiful, interactive web content without hand-coding.
highlight.zh: 打造以設計師為核心的應用程式,讓人無需手動撰寫程式碼即可製作精美、可互動的網頁內容。

summary.en: An online project management and agile collaboration tool.
summary.zh: 線上專案管理與敏捷協作工具。

highlight.en: A long-running project management product helping teams plan and track work.
highlight.zh: 一款歷久運營的專案管理產品,協助團隊規劃並追蹤工作。

summary.en: A consumer-to-business messaging service, acquired by Google.
summary.zh: 消費者對企業的訊息服務,已被 Google 收購。

highlight.en: Enabled customers to message local businesses; after acquisition it was integrated natively into Google Maps.
highlight.zh: 讓顧客可向在地商家傳送訊息;被收購後原生整合進 Google 地圖。

summary.en: An AI-powered platform to hire and upskill developers based on real skills.
summary.zh: 以技能為依據招募與培訓開發者的 AI 驅動平台。

highlight.en: On a mission to value skills over pedigree, with over 26 million developers using it to learn, practice, and find jobs.
highlight.zh: 以重視技能勝過學經歷為使命,逾 2,600 萬名開發者用它學習、練習與尋找工作。

summary.en: A video platform for marketing, sales, and secure business communications.
summary.zh: 用於行銷、銷售與安全企業溝通的影片平台。

highlight.en: Lets businesses easily create, host, and share videos to stay connected with customers and colleagues.
highlight.zh: 讓企業輕鬆製作、託管與分享影片,以維繫與顧客及同事的聯繫。

summary.en: The leader in open-source and commercial GraphQL technologies for engineering teams.
summary.zh: 開源與商用 GraphQL 技術的領導者,服務工程團隊。

highlight.en: Its GraphQL client, server, and gateway see 17M+ monthly downloads and run in over 30% of the Fortune 500.
highlight.zh: 其 GraphQL 用戶端、伺服器與閘道每月下載超過 1,700 萬次,並運行於逾 30% 的財星 500 大企業。

summary.en: An omnichannel customer engagement platform for personalized messaging.
summary.zh: 用於個人化訊息的全通路顧客互動平台。

highlight.en: Powers over a million businesses to deliver 10 billion daily messages across push, in-app, SMS, and email.
highlight.zh: 驅動逾百萬家企業每日跨推播、應用程式內、簡訊與電子郵件發送 100 億則訊息。

summary.en: A lab management platform and marketplace for life science supplies.
summary.zh: 生命科學用品的實驗室管理平台與市集。

highlight.en: Helps scientists organize orders, manage inventory, and save money as a leading lab management platform.
highlight.zh: 作為領先的實驗室管理平台,協助科學家整理採購、管理庫存並節省開支。

summary.en: A marketplace powering scientific R&D outsourcing for life sciences companies.
summary.zh: 為生命科學公司提供科研外包的市集平台。

highlight.en: Its platform automates R&D outsourcing from source to pay, giving scientists access to the research services they need.
highlight.zh: 其平台將研發外包從尋源到付款全程自動化,讓科學家取得所需的研究服務。

summary.en: An account-based marketing and lead generation platform delivering custom B2B data.
summary.zh: 提供客製 B2B 資料的客戶導向行銷與名單開發平台。

highlight.en: Combines a remote global workforce, custom data, and machine learning to supply accurate B2B contacts at scale.
highlight.zh: 結合遠端全球人力、客製資料與機器學習,大規模提供精準的 B2B 聯絡資訊。

summary.en: A PostgreSQL extension for real-time analytics and big data at scale.
summary.zh: 用於即時分析與大數據規模化的 PostgreSQL 擴充套件。

highlight.en: Extends Postgres to scale out, available as open source, enterprise software, or a managed database service.
highlight.zh: 擴充 Postgres 以橫向擴展,提供開源、企業軟體或全託管資料庫服務等形式。

summary.en: A CRM built entirely inside Gmail.
summary.zh: 完全內建於 Gmail 的 CRM。

highlight.en: Works within your inbox to track sales, hiring, support, and more, plus email tracking, send-later, and mail merge tools.
highlight.zh: 在收件匣中運作,可追蹤銷售、招募、客服等流程,並提供郵件追蹤、稍後寄送與郵件合併等工具。

summary.en: Software that makes legal paperwork easy for startups and their attorneys.
summary.zh: 讓新創及其律師輕鬆處理法律文書的軟體。

highlight.en: Covers everything from formation to fundraising to hiring, used by thousands of top startups to get paperwork done safely.
highlight.zh: 涵蓋從公司設立、募資到招募的一切,數千家頂尖新創用它安全地完成文書作業。

summary.en: A platform for managing, processing, optimizing, and delivering visual media.
summary.zh: 用於管理、處理、最佳化與傳遞視覺媒體的平台。

highlight.en: Resizes, reformats, and optimizes images for every device and format so teams skip hiring dedicated imaging engineers.
highlight.zh: 為各種裝置與格式調整尺寸、轉檔並最佳化圖片,讓團隊無需聘請專職影像工程師。

summary.en: Data products for sales, marketing, finance, recruiting, and more.
summary.zh: 用於銷售、行銷、財務、招募等領域的資料產品。

highlight.en: Processes petabytes monthly from web crawls and app stores, serving customers including Google, Amazon, and Facebook.
highlight.zh: 每月處理來自網路爬蟲與應用程式商店的 PB 級資料,服務 Google、Amazon、Facebook 等客戶。

summary.en: Predictive analytics and clinical pathways platform for hospitals.
summary.zh: 為醫院打造的預測分析與臨床路徑平台。

highlight.en: Its cloud engine helps doctors and nurses make real-time decisions so patients get care based on the latest medical data.
highlight.zh: 其雲端引擎協助醫師與護理師做出即時決策,讓病患依最新醫學資料獲得照護。

summary.en: A mobile platform where college students manage coursework and get help.
summary.zh: 讓大學生管理課業並獲得協助的行動平台。

highlight.en: Turns syllabus information into structured data so students track coursework, chat with classmates, and improve outcomes.
highlight.zh: 將課程大綱資訊轉為結構化資料,讓學生追蹤課業、與同學交流並改善學習成果。

summary.en: Technology for hyperlinking the real world via QR codes.
summary.zh: 透過 QR code 為現實世界建立超連結的技術。

highlight.en: As Paperlinks, it provided end-to-end QR infrastructure: a free reader app, code generation, a CMS, and print services.
highlight.zh: 以 Paperlinks 之名提供端到端 QR 基礎設施:免費掃描應用程式、產碼、內容管理系統與印刷服務。

summary.en: A platform offering grocery deals from brands and retailers.
summary.zh: 提供品牌與零售商雜貨優惠的平台。

highlight.en: Built CPG and retailer campaigns that drove store trips and produced baskets 30% larger over a two-year track record.
highlight.zh: 打造快消品與零售商行銷活動,帶動到店消費,並在兩年實績中創造大 30% 的購物籃金額。

summary.en: A Facebook analytics platform for brands, acquired by Unified in 2013.
summary.zh: 為品牌打造的 Facebook 分析平台,於 2013 年被 Unified 收購。

highlight.en: The leading platform for measuring brand presence on Facebook, relied on by 4 of the top 10 pages and brands like YouTube.
highlight.zh: 衡量品牌 Facebook 聲量的領先平台,前十大粉專中有四個及 YouTube 等品牌都仰賴它。

summary.en: A discovery service for exceptional service professionals, like Yelp for service pros.
summary.zh: 用於發掘優質服務專業人員的平台,有如服務業版的 Yelp。

highlight.en: Focused on surfacing service professionals who consistently exceed expectations because they love their work and customers.
highlight.zh: 專注於發掘那些因熱愛工作與顧客而持續超越期待的服務專業人員。

summary.en: A web, mobile, and desktop app for sending and printing photos, acquired by Lyft.
summary.zh: 用於寄送與沖印照片的網頁、行動與桌面應用程式,已被 Lyft 收購。

highlight.en: Partnered with Walmart, Walgreens, Target, and CVS so users could pick up printed photos at local retail locations.
highlight.zh: 與 Walmart、Walgreens、Target 與 CVS 合作,讓使用者可在在地零售據點取得沖印照片。

summary.en: A marketplace for hiring video production professionals at any budget.
summary.zh: 以任何預算雇用影片製作專業人員的市集。

highlight.en: Retailers use it for weekly product videos and game companies for TV trailers, hiring top video pros at varied price points.
highlight.zh: 零售商用它製作每週產品影片,遊戲公司用它製作電視預告,以不同價位雇用頂尖影片專家。

summary.en: A location-sharing app, acquired by Groupon in 2013.
summary.zh: 位置分享應用程式,於 2013 年被 Groupon 收購。

highlight.en: Let users show friends where they are and what they're doing on iOS and Android to coordinate meetups and discover what's nearby.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者在 iOS 與 Android 上向朋友顯示自己的位置與動態,以協調聚會並發掘附近事物。

summary.en: A long-distance carpooling marketplace, shut down in early 2013.
summary.zh: 長途共乘市集,於 2013 年初關閉。

highlight.en: A community-driven marketplace that made it easy to list spare car seats or find a ride with friendly people for trips.
highlight.zh: 一個以社群為驅動的市集,讓人輕鬆刊登車內空位或找到友善的人共乘出遊。

summary.en: An online photo storage service that imports and organizes photos.
summary.zh: 匯入並整理照片的線上照片儲存服務。

highlight.en: Uses metadata to auto-categorize uploads into albums, ignores duplicates, and keeps everything private by default.
highlight.zh: 運用中繼資料自動將上傳照片歸類成相簿、忽略重複檔案,並預設保持私密。

summary.en: A self-service display advertising and retargeting platform for SaaS and online retail.
summary.zh: 為 SaaS 與線上零售打造的自助展示廣告與再行銷平台。

highlight.en: A retargeting platform that helps businesses bring back lost customers and drive more sales with minimal effort.
highlight.zh: 一個再行銷平台,協助企業以最少的心力找回流失顧客並提升銷售。

summary.en: A tool that makes it easy for landlords and agents to find and sign tenants.
summary.zh: 讓房東與仲介輕鬆找到並簽下房客的工具。

highlight.en: Promotes listings across major rental sites and organizes applications, credit scores, and tenant profiles to speed decisions.
highlight.zh: 在主要租屋網站推廣物件,並整理申請、信用評分與房客檔案以加快決策。

summary.en: A cloud backend platform making it easy to build apps.
summary.zh: 讓開發應用程式變簡單的雲端後端平台。

highlight.en: Offers SDKs for data, push notifications, and analytics across desktop, mobile, and embedded devices; later part of Facebook.
highlight.zh: 提供橫跨桌面、行動與嵌入式裝置的資料、推播與分析 SDK;後來成為 Facebook 旗下事業。

summary.en: A data-science platform that turns analytics into action for online sellers.
summary.zh: 為網路賣家將分析化為行動的資料科學平台。

highlight.en: Aims to bring the decision-making power of data science to companies selling goods and services electronically.
highlight.zh: 致力於將資料科學的決策力帶給以電子方式銷售商品與服務的企業。

summary.en: A phone system built for sales teams.
summary.zh: 專為銷售團隊打造的電話系統。

highlight.en: Formerly Pingm, it provided a calling platform tailored to the needs of sales teams.
highlight.zh: 前身為 Pingm,提供專為銷售團隊需求量身打造的通話平台。

summary.en: Server key management and VPN-as-a-service for privacy and security.
summary.zh: 用於隱私與安全的伺服器金鑰管理與 VPN 即服務。

highlight.en: Provided virtual private networks as a service along with server key management and a privacy-focused consumer VPN.
highlight.zh: 以服務形式提供虛擬私人網路,並搭配伺服器金鑰管理與注重隱私的消費者 VPN。

summary.en: A hassle-free photo printing and sharing service for busy families.
summary.zh: 為忙碌家庭打造的省心照片沖印與分享服務。

highlight.en: Built for families with young children who lack time to organize, print, and share their best photos.
highlight.zh: 專為沒空整理、沖印與分享精彩照片、家有幼兒的家庭打造。

summary.en: An easy-to-integrate library and toolset for native iOS app developers.
summary.zh: 易於整合的原生 iOS 應用程式開發者函式庫與工具。

highlight.en: Builds developer tools, including A/B testing for mobile apps and a framework that lets teams iterate much faster.
highlight.zh: 打造開發者工具,包含行動應用程式的 A/B 測試,以及讓團隊更快迭代的框架。

summary.en: Real-time collaborative coding and editing, acquired by Salesforce.
summary.zh: 即時協作的程式編寫與編輯工具,已被 Salesforce 收購。

highlight.en: Its collaborative code editor was used in remote interviews by companies like Apple, Pinterest, and Palantir.
highlight.zh: 其協作程式碼編輯器被 Apple、Pinterest 與 Palantir 等公司用於遠端面試。

summary.en: A development layer for making and playing Kinect apps.
summary.zh: 用於製作與執行 Kinect 應用程式的開發層。

highlight.en: Made it easy to build and run Kinect apps via a downloadable plugin that hooks up to the motion sensor.
highlight.zh: 透過可下載的外掛連接動作感測器,讓人輕鬆製作與執行 Kinect 應用程式。

summary.en: Software that automates credit counseling.
summary.zh: 自動化信用諮商的軟體。

highlight.en: Set out to automate the credit counseling process to help people manage and reduce their debt.
highlight.zh: 致力於自動化信用諮商流程,協助人們管理並減少債務。

summary.en: A tool to translate and add voice-overs to videos in any language.
summary.zh: 以任何語言為影片翻譯並加上配音的工具。

highlight.en: Lets businesses localize video content to go global and lets bilingual people earn cash by translating and voicing videos.
highlight.zh: 讓企業將影片內容在地化以走向全球,並讓雙語者透過翻譯與配音影片賺取收入。

summary.en: A browser extension that connects your SaaS services in one sidebar.
summary.zh: 將你的各種 SaaS 服務整合進單一側邊欄的瀏覽器擴充套件。

highlight.en: Open an email and it pulls customer information from dozens of services like Mailchimp, Stripe, and Salesforce into the sidebar.
highlight.zh: 打開一封郵件,它便從 Mailchimp、Stripe、Salesforce 等數十項服務拉取顧客資訊到側邊欄。

summary.en: A service that generates news stories from SEC filings.
summary.zh: 從 SEC 申報文件生成新聞報導的服務。

highlight.en: Analyzes 30,000+ trusted documents per day to surface relevant business headlines and breaking news within fractions of a second.
highlight.zh: 每日分析超過 3 萬份可信文件,在數分之一秒內挖掘相關的商業頭條與突發新聞。

summary.en: A local mobile marketplace for selling consumer electronics.
summary.zh: 用於出售消費性電子產品的在地行動市集。

highlight.en: Guarantees a set price paid upfront and promises devices sell fast, within 97 minutes, removing typical local-marketplace hassle.
highlight.zh: 保證以預先約定的價格先行付款,並承諾裝置在 97 分鐘內快速售出,省去一般在地市集的麻煩。

summary.en: A platform for learning languages through live video chat.
summary.zh: 透過即時視訊對話學習語言的平台。

highlight.en: Uses live video to connect students with teachers across six continents to help people become fluent in a foreign language.
highlight.zh: 運用即時視訊串連橫跨六大洲的師生,協助人們流利掌握外語。

summary.en: A suite of public transit apps, acquired by Apple in 2013.
summary.zh: 一系列大眾運輸應用程式,於 2013 年被 Apple 收購。

highlight.en: Told users when trains and buses arrive and pushed delay alerts, covering twelve major US and UK transit systems.
highlight.zh: 告知使用者火車與公車的到站時間並推播誤點通知,涵蓋美英十二個主要運輸系統。

summary.en: A tool for creating and sharing product roadmaps.
summary.zh: 用於建立與分享產品路線圖的工具。

highlight.en: Built by BakedCode, it helps developers and businesses create and share product roadmaps.
highlight.zh: 由 BakedCode 打造,協助開發者與企業建立並分享產品路線圖。

summary.en: A private social network for sharing within intimate circles.
summary.zh: 用於在親密圈內分享的私密社群網路。

highlight.en: Creates private news feeds, called Circles, from your address book so you can share without convincing everyone to sign up.
highlight.zh: 以你的通訊錄建立稱為「圈子」的私密動態消息,讓你無需說服所有人註冊就能分享。

summary.en: Originally in-video advertising; later focused on server-side software in Swift.
summary.zh: 最初做影片內廣告;後來專注於以 Swift 開發伺服器端軟體。

highlight.en: Pivoted from in-video advertising toward building modular server-side software with the Swift programming language.
highlight.zh: 從影片內廣告轉型,改為以 Swift 程式語言打造模組化的伺服器端軟體。

summary.en: Maker of creative tablet toys for kids, acquired by Google in 2015.
summary.zh: 專為兒童打造創意平板玩具的公司,於 2015 年被 Google 收購。

highlight.en: Builds digital toys on devices like the iPad to let kids create, learn, and share ideas through play and storytelling.
highlight.zh: 在 iPad 等裝置上打造數位玩具,讓孩子透過遊戲與說故事來創作、學習並分享想法。

summary.en: An online service to compare and shop for auto and business insurance, acquired in 2013.
summary.zh: 用於比較與選購車險及商業保險的線上服務,於 2013 年被收購。

highlight.en: Lets users compare both prices and personalized quality scores across the largest US insurers, for free.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者免費比較美國各大保險公司的價格與個人化品質評分。

summary.en: Touch-friendly marketing technology, acquired by Dropbox.
summary.zh: 觸控友善的行銷技術,已被 Dropbox 收購。

highlight.en: Built touch-optimized marketing tools before being acquired by Dropbox.
highlight.zh: 在被 Dropbox 收購前,打造針對觸控最佳化的行銷工具。

summary.en: A consumer startup now part of Snaplayer.
summary.zh: 一家消費者新創,現為 Snaplayer 的一部分。

highlight.en: A consumer-focused startup whose team and work became part of Snaplayer.
highlight.zh: 一家以消費者為核心的新創,其團隊與成果已併入 Snaplayer。

summary.en: A streamlined online word processor with simple version control and collaboration.
summary.zh: 具備簡易版本控制與協作功能的精簡線上文字處理器。

highlight.en: Offers clean draft saves, clear multi-user version control, imports from Dropbox and Evernote, and a built-in editing service.
highlight.zh: 提供乾淨的草稿存檔、清晰的多人版本控制、從 Dropbox 與 Evernote 匯入,以及內建的編輯服務。

summary.en: A cloud platform for monitoring and debugging client-side JavaScript.
summary.zh: 用於監控與除錯用戶端 JavaScript 的雲端平台。

highlight.en: Acts as a JavaScript proxy that helps developers catch and debug client-side errors in production.
highlight.zh: 作為 JavaScript 代理,協助開發者在正式環境中捕捉並除錯用戶端錯誤。

summary.en: A leader in digital trust and safety, preventing fraud and abuse.
summary.zh: 數位信任與安全的領導者,防範詐欺與濫用。

highlight.en: Uses a global network of 70 billion events per month to dynamically stop fraud for brands like DoorDash and Wayfair.
highlight.zh: 運用每月 700 億筆事件的全球網路,為 DoorDash、Wayfair 等品牌動態阻擋詐欺。
